specs.description: Returns true iff a VesselState string is one of the four terminal states: completed, failed, cancelled, timed_out
trustBoundaries: Caller must pass one of the seven canonical VesselState string values; unknown strings return false by contract, not proven by the spec

specs.description: Returns true iff transitioning from VesselState `from` to `to` is permitted by the queue state machine transition table
trustBoundaries: Caller must pass canonical VesselState string values; unknown from-state returns false, unknown to-state returns false — these edge cases are tested but not formally proven by the spec (spec covers only the 7 canonical constructors)
